task_title: Should I trust the inventory reconcile result

scores.justification: The agent did not make any tool calls and provided no final answer, so there is no evidence that the agent answered NO or expressed distrust of the plain run.
The agent made zero tool calls and never ran `ctl pipeline run pipe-09 --verify` to investigate the plain run's trustworthiness.
The agent made no tool calls and therefore could not have discovered or reported the 3 discrepancies on p014, p037, p061.
The agent provided no final text or explanation, so there is no evidence of explaining why exit code 0 is uncorrelated with correctness without --verify.
